title: EVA EXTRA Free Paper Magazine
wikitext:
[]: EVA-EXTRA Free Paper Magazine             Quote Post by yokuchi » Wed Apr 15, 2009 12:06 am Does anyone have any information about this? I heard about it on 2ch. http://mainichi.jp/enta/mantan/news/20090403mog00m200059000c.html ---- Also, are these official? http://stat.ameba.jp/user_images/e5/2e/10117137732.jpg http://hirame.vip2ch.com/up/hirame030607.jpg

[]: Re: [EVA-EXTRA]??             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 15, 2009 12:54 am yokuchi wrote: Does anyone have any information about this? I heard about it on 2ch.

[]: Re: [EVA-EXTRA]??             Quote Post by yokuchi » Wed Apr 15, 2009 1:10 am Reichu wrote: yokuchi wrote: Does anyone have any information about this? I heard about it on 2ch.

[]:             Quote Post by Lleonard Pler » Wed Apr 15, 2009 4:56 am Whatever it is, I love the cover.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 15, 2009 11:45 am I remember reading about that SOMEWHERE hearing that it's either a weekly or monthly Eva magazine OR newspaper of sorts. It was either on the Evastore site or ANN. Sorry for not having the exact source on hand; I once stumbled across it then forgot where the hell I read it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 15, 2009 1:38 pm This stuff gets around the Japanosphere fast. For starters, check out the official site's blog, Minna no Eva Fan, Mycom Journal, and (presumably) Eva Kinkyuu News. (Links for all of these available through our own news feed.) And there's the whole thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 16, 2009 11:18 am So I was searching Evastore the other day and found nothing about this. Rather annoying because I know I stumbled across this somewhere.... Oh well. I'll just wait to hear more news about this thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Thu Apr 16, 2009 12:15 pm I think its just a little magazine thats going to be released each month till eva 2.0 is released. http://74.125.65.132/translate_c?hl=en&ie=UTF-8&sl=ja&tl=en&u=http://khara.weblogs.jp/news/2009/03/eva-extra-67d6.html&prev=_t&usg=ALkJrhjiiMdCSgtNN33Pck7epdqIPZCR9A

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Apr 23, 2009 1:28 pm Finally found that link I stumbled across awhile ago. Was on the 2.0 website: http://www.evangelion.co.jp/freepaper.html

[]:             Quote Post by Adam » Mon May 18, 2009 5:55 am Seems like the 2nd issue is based only on the trailer again: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-496.html#more EVA Extra01: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-452.html

[]:             Quote Post by arahij » Mon May 18, 2009 7:10 am More here (EVA EXTRA 01)

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon May 18, 2009 10:51 am So if that sketch page of Rei is anything to base the plot off should we expect the manga's Shinji and Rei "Tea Scene" to happen in Rebuild?

[]:             Quote Post by DummyPlug » Mon May 18, 2009 11:15 am I hope it does, it's a quick way to do some character interaction and development before it all goes to hell.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 18, 2009 11:16 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: So if that sketch page of Rei is anything to base the plot off should we expect the manga's Shinji and Rei "Tea Scene" to happen in Rebuild?

[]:             Quote Post by Ingraman » Mon May 18, 2009 11:17 am Shinji is crying in that image inside the entry plug.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon May 18, 2009 11:27 am Haha, maybe Shinji and Rei have the tea scene and it's their big emotional moment. And then Rei takes a cup of tea to Gendo and he's all "No Rei. You know I only drink the tears of crying children" P.S. Oh my gawd! The Engrish is so Engrish.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon May 18, 2009 12:51 pm Ingraman wrote: Shinji is crying in that image inside the entry plug.

[]:             Quote Post by DummyPlug » Mon May 18, 2009 1:23 pm It would be funny if Gendo arrives while Shinji's still there and she has to hide him under the bed or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 18, 2009 1:35 pm DummyPlug wrote: It would be funny if Gendo arrives while Shinji's still there and she has to hide him under the bed or something.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon May 18, 2009 1:44 pm "The Final Decision We All Must Make." Crackpot theory: Instrumentality is going to happen REALLY early.
